meta.title: Oraculux — The Multilingual Oracle That Answers What Logic Can’t
meta.description: Oraculux — a multilingual oracle that answers what logic can't. Ask your question and receive a symbolic, intuitive response.
meta.keywords: oraculux, oracle, multilingual oracle, kotarsis, prediction, fortune telling, mystical answers, cosmic oracle, intuition answers, spiritual guidance, ask the oracle, destiny generator

hero.title: Oraculux knows what you never thought about

modal.text:
I didn’t expect you to click that... Most just scroll past.
But you — you felt something.
Shall we talk?

benefits.title: What makes Oraculux inevitable
benefits.description: We don't promise, we predict. That's why people trust us:

cards.title: Nonsense makes sense
cards.description: “Predictions without logic are the most real”

cards.title: Even AI doesn’t get it
cards.description: “AI won't help in all situations, but Oraculux might...”

hiw.title: The energetic journey of your question

ritual.title: Ask the Oracle
ritual.description: Find the answer to one of the questions that intrigues you.

whenFindLove.question: When will I find my love?
answers: When you stop looking
Soon. Very soon
Are you ready?
She is you

whenKnowWant.question: When will I know what I really want?
answers: When you get tired of pretending
The answer will come in silence
Are you sure you want to know?
It's too late not to want truth

keepPuttingOff.question: Why do I keep putting it off?
answers: Because you're afraid to do it for real
Time isn't ready for you yet
You're reading this right now — you're not putting it off
Because you're a person, not an alarm clock

whatAhead.question: What awaits me ahead?
answers: What you build
Infinite "possible"
Coffee and strange coincidences
You don't want a spoiler, do you?

whyDoingThis.question: Why am I doing all this?
answers: Because you can't help but do it
So that one day you'll understand why
You just like drama
Because someone has to

rightTrack.question: Am I on the right track?
answers: If it disturbs you, then yes
There is no path until you go
What if it is a ring?
You created it yourself, then it is yours

whenBetter.question: When will everything get better?
answers: When you stop expecting it
After much chaos comes clarity
It will get better, but you won't notice
Yesterday. Just check your email

whatDoLife.question: What should I do with my life?
answers: Start small — and don't stop
Follow the noise inside
Think about it after lunch
Turn to the nearest cat

form.title: Speak, and be heard
form.description: “The Oracle listens only when silence breaks.”
form.response: Your message is sent. Wait for a response

error.invalidEmail: Even stars do not misplace their dots and @...
error.shortName: Oracle needs a name to whisper to...
error.emptyQuestion: Oracle can predict… but cannot hear silence.

constellationMap.title: Messages Written in the Stars
constellationMap.subline: Each constellation whispers a truth from beyond.

graffiti.1: “Try turning it off and on again.”
graffiti.6: “It won’t be easy… but it will be worth it.”
graffiti.11: “Even I don’t know what that means.”
graffiti.14: “Beware of silence that agrees too easily.”
graffiti.18: “Yes. No. Maybe. Ask again when Mercury isn’t drunk.”

about.handcrafted: 🔮 Hand-crafted in the shadow of the stars
about.noAiHarmed: ✨ No AI was harmed in the making of this prophecy
